steps.t: The boots needed for stomping on shrews can be found near the stairs of the Festival Garden. You should collect the boots from the crate and drag them…
The pesky shrews can be found in the garden's centre in Duillond's Festival Garden, and the shrew-stomping boots are in your inventory. You should loc…
Dinedhrín stands in the Elven Garden at Duillond. You should speak with Dinedhrín of your victory against the shrews.
